title: What Is Available to Her Is Available to Me
subtitle: An energy statement practice for releasing the belief that abundance is for others
excerpt: An energy statement practice for Day 16 of the money arc. These statements work with the specific belief that money flows to other people but not to you — the feeling of being permanently excluded from financial abundance.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Built from the Day 16 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796): letting go of 'others can, not me'.

practice.whenToUse: When seeing others succeed financially brings up envy, frustration, or the conviction that wealth is for other people — not for you.

content.text: Energy statements for Day 16 of the money arc. Say each one aloud, slowly. These work with the belief that abundance is available to everyone except you — and replace it with the straightforward claim that you are included.
What's available to her is available to me.
Abundance doesn't have a cap. There is enough for all of us.
I am not the exception. I am included.
If it's possible for anyone, it's possible for me.
I belong in the flow of wealth.
I celebrate others' abundance as proof that mine is also available.
I stop waiting to be chosen. I choose.
Money finds me. I expect it.
Built from the Day 16 theme of
MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout
(Rebecca J Page, 2025): letting go of 'others can, not me'.
